results.rendered_html:
prasādhaka (vom caus. von sādh mit pra)
1〉 adj. f. ˚dhikā schmückend: āśā˚  VĀSAVAD. 13 . vīraḥ saptadvīpaprasādhakaḥ  MĀRK. P. 127,32 .
— 2〉 m. Ankleider, Schmücker, Kammerdiener  KĀM. NĪTIS. 12,45 .  RAGH. 17,22 . f. prasādhikā Kammermädchen 7,7 .
— 3〉 f. ˚dhikā wilder Reis  BHĀVAPR. _im_ ŚKDR. ; vgl. prasātikā.

results.rendered_html:
prasādhaka a. (dhikā f.)
1 Accomplishing, or perfecting.
2 Purifying, cleansing.
3 Decorating, ornamenting.
— kaḥ A valet-de-chambre, an attendant who dresses his master;  R. 17. 22.
